extraction.description: Per logical-doc extraction alignment on constructed multi-source cases

equivalence_collapse.description: Canonical key / alias equivalence on constructed cases

fusion.description: multi_source_confirmed + fusion contract on constructed cases

conflict_classification.description: Expected conflict status match on constructed conflict cases

readiness_promotion.description: Promotion must track fusion_ok; ghost_pass_count must be 0

natural_onboarding_draft.notes: Natural thresholds are draft — primary signal is failure_mode split (corpus_limited vs system_gap), not headline pass rate
